source: native flatline windows from public scalar streams
label_definition: same-bin or small-range raw flatline windows matched with negatives
conclusion: PrivSAF is effective on flatline-like scalar windows and estimates the stuck bucket.

label_definition: SLH_QC=5 episodes with length at least 8
label_semantics: field-QC stuck labels with multiple regimes and local changes
key_scale: 8 selected years; max episode 5916 rows; 25707 persistent stuck rows
conclusion: GLR wins on field-QC labels, while PrivSAF remains a diagnostic comparator for single-bucket stuck semantics.
dropout is handled by the availability emission rather than the stuck-at HMM.

label_definition: five prepared stuck-at files with row labels
conclusion: local window statistics match the row-level prepared-label semantics better than one scalar stuck bucket.

source: HadISD station 702606-96401 plus compact and cross-page screens
key_scale: Single RSS case has 692 usable rows and 140 positives; compact screen has 5 RSS/WSS cases with HMM selected on 2/2 RSS and 2/3 WSS; page-7 screen has 400 station-variable rows with 7 TSS 17 DSS and 0 PSS eligible cases; page-0 screen has 360 station-variable rows with 20 TSS 18 DSS and 0 PSS eligible cases and HMM AUPRC lifts 1.97x on TSS and 2.13x on DSS
conclusion: PrivSAF-HMM is strongest on RSS/WSS wind strings; page-7 and page-0 TSS/DSS broaden the real panel and page 0 roughly doubles AUPRC over prevalence.

source: NOAA CO-OPS verified six-minute water level ERDDAP
label_definition: verified six-minute F=1 flat-tolerance flag joined to WL_VALUE in the same public rows
label_semantics: official real scalar flatline/tolerance QC labels
key_scale: 4687 public numeric F=1 rows across 108 station-months; frozen KRR-LDP panel runs 40 station-months, 291283 total rows, and 4556 official flat-flag positives; support-ge25 tier has 7 cases and AUPRC 0.102
conclusion: CO-OPS supplies official public value+label flat-tolerance evidence; raw flatness scores align with the F labels and the full KRR-LDP panel selects a PrivSAF range-HMM above report-frequency and GLR.
